title: Solar Logical Operator Registry
description: Routing abstraction layer between DAG nodes and physical actor assignments. Defines the 16 P0 logical operator types, their bindings to candidate actor_ids, and the DAG node constraint that prevents direct physical id use.

bindings.description: Maps each logical_operator_type to an ordered list of candidate actor_ids.

logical_operator_type.description: P0 logical operator types. These are abstract routing labels — never physical actor or model ids.

required_capabilities.description: Minimum capability_profile scores required for actor assignment.

risk_constraints.description: Risk profile constraints that assigned actors must satisfy.

cost_hint.description: Expected cost tier for tasks assigned to this operator.

max_parallel.description: Maximum concurrent instances of this operator type.

singleton.description: If true, only one instance may run at a time globally.

candidates.description: Ordered list of actor_ids eligible for this logical operator. First entry is preferred.

actor_id.description: Must match an actor_id in agent-actors.json.

priority.description: Lower is higher priority. Ties resolved by order in array.

condition.description: Optional condition for when this candidate is eligible: always, quota_ok, low_load.

selection_policy.description: How to choose among available candidates.

fallback_policy.description: What to do when all candidates are unavailable.

dag_node.description: Schema for a DAG task node. Logical operator is the correct field; direct physical ids are rejected unless compatibility=true.

logical_operator.description: Preferred assignment field. Routes via binding table at dispatch time.

compatibility.description: Set true only for legacy DAGs that use direct physical actor/operator/model ids. New DAGs MUST leave this false and use logical_operator instead.

physical_actor_id.description: Direct actor assignment. Only valid when compatibility=true. Bypasses routing table.

physical_operator_id.description: Direct physical-operators.json key. Only valid when compatibility=true.

physical_model_id.description: Direct model id. Only valid when compatibility=true.
